title: The Artisan Frontiers
description: This is a fantasy-based RPG pack with something for everyone. Including: exploration, building, magic, roleplaying, combat, or casual. While also staying true to the vanilla game.
body:
**DISCLAIMER: THIS PACK IS STILL IN BETA, SO THERE ARE BUGS AND PERFORMANCE ISSUES**

**The Artisan Frontiers** is a modpack I have spent the better part of a year on. I have had tons of input and put a lot of my own blood, sweat, and tears into this to make it as vanilla-friendly and fun as I can. It takes aspects from adventure, puzzles, combat, building, and even farming then it amplifies them by 10. There are over **10 new bosses**, **2 new dimensions**, plenty of **new weapons and armors**, and infinite ways to play. _And the content will just keep on coming!_


This modpack aims to include a plethora of **RPG elements** while not being extremely overwhelming or lackluster. With a seamless fit between all additions to create a **one of a kind Minecraft experience for everyone** (I know, such an original description you definitely haven't heard before) but that is where this pack aims to be different, with **no linear path or quest line** to do anything, you get to do what you want when you want to, no walls are hiding you from unlocking something, or certain key items trapped behind a boss.

![Wandering Knight resting by the fire after a long day of travel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d188fa3ca4270fd7f29826474c992e5f8ec60c43_0.webp)

**AF** features:
- An entire fishing, combat, building, and farming overhaul. To make all of these items f**resh and more fun to use**.
- Plenty of new and **optional** bosses to fight and level up your skills with
- Speaking of skills, an entire new **skill tree**, with other skill trees unlocked once you reach the end and choose a class
- Tons of new **armor sets and outfits**, which can be fused with your strongest armor to get, -as an example- the strength of Dragonsteel, with the design of a wandering wizard
- New biomes and structures with an entire village overhaul, making villagers seem more real and less like exploitable AI
- New **visual overhaul** with particles, fog, and sounds
- Overhauled nether and end, with an entirely **new aether-like dimension** (_an eldritch dimension is also soon to be added_)
- And an immersive world that grows and changes with you!

This modpack is made for exploring and going your own path. I hope you are able to forge your own and build the world you have always wanted to.

_Not all those who wander are lost_
-JRR Tolkien
